---
title: "GhostTraceLayer.tsx"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/components/GhostTraceLayer.tsx"
loc: 40
complexity: 3
logic_score: 7.95
style_score: 4.06
intel_score: 3.00
overall_score: 4.89
---

## Intent
React component rendering GhostTraceLayer.

## Interaction Protocol
Include <GhostTraceLayer /> within a React-Three-Fiber Canvas context.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useMemo](file://react)
- [useRef](file://react)
- [*](file://three)
- [useFrame](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [Line](file://@react-three/drei)
- [GhostTrace](file://../types/index.ts)

### Exports
- `TraceLine`
- `lineRef`
- `GhostTraceLayer`
- `GhostTraceLayer`
